channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Bibi's Hair Was On Fire": Trump, Netanyahu's Hour-Long Tense Call On Iran

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu now reportedly wants to visit Washington in the coming weeks for a meeting with Trump

item.description: Despite disagreement with Netanyahu, Trump maintained a united front in public about their Iran plan. He told reporters that Netanyahu "will do whatever I want him to do" on Iran, though he also said they had a good relationship.
item.content:encoded: Despite disagreement with Netanyahu, Trump maintained a united front in public about their Iran plan. He told reporters that Netanyahu "will do whatever I want him to do" on Iran, though he also said they had a good relationship.

item.title: "Always Sad To Say Goodbye": Mark Zuckerberg To 8,000 Laid-Off Meta Employees

media:content.media:description: Mark Zuckerberg said he did not expect additional company-wide layoffs this year.

item.description: The layoff notifications went out beginning in the early morning hours, with Singapore-based Meta workers among the first to be informed.
item.content:encoded: The layoff notifications went out beginning in the early morning hours, with Singapore-based Meta workers among the first to be informed.

item.title: US Aircraft Carrier USS Nimitz Enters Caribbean Amid Rising Cuba Tensions

media:content.media:description: USS Nimitz strike group enters Caribbean amid heightened US-Cuba diplomatic strain.

item.description: USS Nimitz and its strike group deploy to Caribbean amid escalating US-Cuba tensions.
item.content:encoded: USS Nimitz and its strike group deploy to Caribbean amid escalating US-Cuba tensions.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Donald Trump Says Iran Talks "Right On The Borderline"

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: UK Eases Sanctions On Russian Fuel Imports Amid Middle East Tensions

media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer defended Wednesday a contentious move to ease sanctions on imports of Russian fuel.

item.description: The UK had announced in October it would ban imports derived from Russian crude, part of a push to cut off revenues funding Russia's war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: The UK had announced in October it would ban imports derived from Russian crude, part of a push to cut off revenues funding Russia's war in Ukraine.

item.title: "Completely Unacceptable": EU Slams Israel Over Gaza Activists' Treatment

media:content.media:description: The video sparked widespread outrage after Israeli police forced Gaza flotilla activists to kneel.

item.description: The European Commission found the treatment of the Gaza flotilla activists shown in a video released by Israel's National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir is "completely unacceptable", a spokesperson said on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: The European Commission found the treatment of the Gaza flotilla activists shown in a video released by Israel's National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir is "completely unacceptable", a spokesperson said on Wednesday.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Is About To Go Public. Here's How It Works

media:content.media:description: SpaceX, according to its filing on Wednesday, intends to list on the Nasdaq with the ticker "SPCX."

item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX filed publicly for its hotly anticipated US initial public offering on Wednesday, moving the firm closer to what could be the biggest stock market flotation ever.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk's SpaceX filed publicly for its hotly anticipated US initial public offering on Wednesday, moving the firm closer to what could be the biggest stock market flotation ever.

item.title: "I'd Like To See Few People Killed": Trump Warns Iran Of "Nasty" Things

media:content.media:description: Trump told reporters that US was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that talks with Tehran were "on the borderline" between a deal to end the Middle East war and a resumption of strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that talks with Tehran were "on the borderline" between a deal to end the Middle East war and a resumption of strikes on Iran.

item.title: Trump Calls Raul Castro Indictment "Very Big Moment", Rules Out Cuba Escalation

media:content.media:description: Trump said he did not see the need for escalation in Cuba.

item.description: President Donald Trump hailed the US indictment of Cuba's former leader Raul Castro on Wednesday but said he did not see the need for escalation, amid speculation that Washington will try to topple the communist state.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump hailed the US indictment of Cuba's former leader Raul Castro on Wednesday but said he did not see the need for escalation, amid speculation that Washington will try to topple the communist state.

item.title: US Charges Ex-Cuba President Raul Castro With Murder Over Downing Of Planes

media:content.media:description: Cuban President Miguel Diaz-Canel condemned the indictment.

item.description: The indictment was related to Castro's alleged role in the shootdown of two small planes operated by the exile group Brothers to the Rescue.
item.content:encoded: The indictment was related to Castro's alleged role in the shootdown of two small planes operated by the exile group Brothers to the Rescue.

item.title: "A Day Apart Feels Like 3 Autumns": Putin, Xi's Bonhomie In Beijing

media:content.media:description: The two countries' ties have deepened since Moscow's 2022 invasion of Ukraine.

item.description: Putin was received by Xi outside Beijing's opulent Great Hall of the People in much the same fashion as Trump last week, complete with chanting children and military fanfare.
item.content:encoded: Putin was received by Xi outside Beijing's opulent Great Hall of the People in much the same fashion as Trump last week, complete with chanting children and military fanfare.

item.title: 'Not Expecting More Company-Wide Layoffs This Year,' Meta CEO Tells Staff

media:content.media:description: In total, the layoffs and transfers announced this week hit about 20 per cent of the Meta workforce.

item.description: He made the announcement on the same day the Facebook owner carried out a massive restructuring of the company, laying off 10 per cent of its workforce globally and transferring 7,000 other employees.
item.content:encoded: He made the announcement on the same day the Facebook owner carried out a massive restructuring of the company, laying off 10 per cent of its workforce globally and transferring 7,000 other employees.

item.title: "Not In Line With Israel's Values": Netanyahu Rebukes Minister After Gaza Video

media:content.media:description: Ben-Gvir released videos Wednesday showing him walking among some of the approximately 430 detainees.

item.description: Netanyahu said that although Israel has every right to stop "provocative flotillas of Hamas terrorist supporters," the way National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir dealt with the activists was "not in line with Israel's values and norms."
item.content:encoded: Netanyahu said that although Israel has every right to stop "provocative flotillas of Hamas terrorist supporters," the way National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir dealt with the activists was "not in line with Israel's values and norms."

item.title: Trump, Netanyahu Hold "Prolonged, Dramatic" Call Amid Iran Threat: Report

media:content.media:description: According to earlier Israeli media reports, the two leaders had also spoken on Sunday evening

item.description: According to earlier Israeli media reports, the two leaders had also spoken on Sunday evening, when discussions reportedly centred on Trump's recent trip to China and his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: According to earlier Israeli media reports, the two leaders had also spoken on Sunday evening, when discussions reportedly centred on Trump's recent trip to China and his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.

item.title: Dramatic Video Shows Car Exploding Near Iconic Charging Bull Statue In New York

media:content.media:description: Despite the heavy foot traffic in the area at the time, officials said no injuries were reported.

item.description: Authorities said it took firefighters nearly 90 minutes to fully bring the fire under control.
item.content:encoded: Authorities said it took firefighters nearly 90 minutes to fully bring the fire under control.

item.title: Will Deliver On Teesta, Padma: Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman
item.description: "In Rajshahi, we will build the Padma Barrage on the Padma River... because across the border, they (India) are extracting water in various ways by constructing barrages and dams," Tarique Rahman said at an event in Dhaka.
item.content:encoded: "In Rajshahi, we will build the Padma Barrage on the Padma River... because across the border, they (India) are extracting water in various ways by constructing barrages and dams," Tarique Rahman said at an event in Dhaka.

item.title: "Netanyahu Will Do Whatever I Want": Trump Claims 99% Rating In Israel

media:content.media:description: Trump said that he is "no hurry" to reach a peace agreement with Iran

item.description: Citing his exceptionally high approval ratings in the country, US President Donald Trump said, "So maybe after I do this, I'll go to Israel, run for prime minister. I had a poll this morning. I'm 99%."
item.content:encoded: Citing his exceptionally high approval ratings in the country, US President Donald Trump said, "So maybe after I do this, I'll go to Israel, run for prime minister. I had a poll this morning. I'm 99%."

item.title: Death Penalty For Killer Of Pak TikTok Influencer Sana Yousuf

media:content.media:description: Speaking after the verdict, Yousuf's family told journalists that justice had been served.

item.description: Islamabad Judge Muhammad Afzal Majoka announced the conviction and verdict for Umar Hayat, who was arrested in June after the killing of 17-year-old Sana Yousuf.
item.content:encoded: Islamabad Judge Muhammad Afzal Majoka announced the conviction and verdict for Umar Hayat, who was arrested in June after the killing of 17-year-old Sana Yousuf.

item.title: Barred From Hajj, Gazans To Mark Third Eid al-Adha Without Animal Sacrifice

media:content.media:description: Eid al-Adha, one of Islam's two main festivals, coincides with the Hajj.

item.description: Gazans will mark Eid al-Adha on May 27 without sacrificial animals for a third straight year due to Israeli restrictions, Gaza's agriculture ministry said.
item.content:encoded: Gazans will mark Eid al-Adha on May 27 without sacrificial animals for a third straight year due to Israeli restrictions, Gaza's agriculture ministry said.

item.title: "Violates Dignity": Meloni Rips Into Israel Over Gaza Protesters Video

media:content.media:description: The video posted by Ben Gvir showed activists kneeling with their hands tied behind their backs.

item.description: Meloni called for the immediate release of any detained Italian citizens and demanded an apology from Israel.
item.content:encoded: Meloni called for the immediate release of any detained Italian citizens and demanded an apology from Israel.
